name: FL Recount Team
subject: Final push
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| We're in the final push, team.

Today is the deadline to complete the Florida Senate hand recount.

We need one last boost to make sure we have the staff we need on the ground fighting for Floridians' votes.

**Support our Recount Team by pitching in here:[http://act.floridadems.org/RECOUNT-FUND](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-senate-recount?amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+httpactfloridademsorgRECOUNTFUND&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181118_1_4&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181118_1_4&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181118_1_4")**

Bill Nelson and Rick Scott are only separated by 0.15%. That's why we are giving this recount everything we have.

There's still time for you to make a difference. Rush a contribution here before today's deadline:

[**http://act.floridadems.org/RECOUNT-FUND**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-senate-recount?amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+httpactfloridademsorgRECOUNTFUND&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181118_1_4&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181118_1_4&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181118_1_4")

Thanks,

Florida Democrats Staff
---
| |
---
We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters.

[Click here if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4ba2f/1a5213b3/6a90ef61/7195f38e/1435786962/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI2YTkwZWY2MSIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6Ijc3YjRiYTJmIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/6a90ef61/77b4ba2f?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Click+here+if+youd+like+to+unsubscribe+f&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181118_1_4&source=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181118_1_4&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_90DO_181118_1_4")
Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats! Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee _Copyright Florida Democratic Party, All rights reserved._

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Sign my petition: Tell the new Congress to debate and pass legislation that would raise the minimum wage from $7.25 an hour — a starvation wage — to a living wage of at least $15 an hour.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
It is a national disgrace that there are millions of people who are forced to work two or three jobs just to pay their bills.
#

Sisters and Brothers -
It is not a radical, socialist idea to say that, when someone works 40 hours a week, that person shouldn’t live in poverty.
We live in the richest country in the history of the world, and it is a national disgrace that there are millions of people who are forced to work two or three jobs just to pay their bills.
That is why, in the first week of the new Congress, I intend to re-introduce my legislation to raise the federal minimum wage from $7.25 an hour to $15 an hour.
Say you’re with me:
**[Sign my petition: Tell the new Congress to debate and pass legislation that would raise the minimum wage from $7.25 an hour — a starvation wage — to a living wage of at least $15 an hour.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/minimum-wage-petition?source=em181118-full&t=1&akid=363%2E150750%2E7lMips)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/minimum-wage-petition?source=em181118-full&t=2&akid=363%2E150750%2E7lMips)
I believe that, from day one, Democrats in Congress must move forward with a progressive agenda to win the support of the American people.
And a $15 minimum wage is not only a popular idea and the right and moral thing to do, it is good policy.
This legislation would give more than 40 million low-wage workers a raise, more than 25 percent of the U.S. workforce. The average worker who would benefit from the bill is more than 35 years old.
Raising the minimum wage would also give a particularly significant boost to women and minority workers.
Today in America, more than half of all African-American workers and nearly 60 percent of Hispanic workers earn less than $15 an hour. And the majority of low-wage workers in this country are women, more than 20 million of whom would get a raise if we passed this bill.
You may not know this, but there is also a direct correlation between healthy babies and higher wages. University researchers have found that every $1 increase in the minimum wage leads to a 2 percent reduction in the risk of a mother having a baby with low birth weight.
Poverty causes stress. Stress causes illness. Decent wages in this country will keep our people healthier.
But this bill does more to make sure these changes are permanent. Because the reality is that if the minimum wage in this country had kept pace with inflation and labor productivity since the late 1960s, it would be almost $30 an hour today. So my bill indexes the minimum wage to median wage growth after it takes full effect in 2024.
It also eliminates the loophole that allows tipped workers and workers with disabilities to be paid substantially less than the federal minimum wage. It also phases out the youth minimum wage, another loophole that allows employers to pay workers under 20 years old a lower wage for their first 90 calendar days of work.
All across the country, workers are standing up and demanding fairer wages — and they are winning.
Since 2012 when striking fast-food workers launched “The Fight for $15,” Seattle, Minneapolis, Washington, D.C., California, New York, and Massachusetts have all raised the minimum wage to $15 an hour. And workers at places like Amazon have made their voices heard and won a $15 minimum wage as well.
I believe that, if we all make our voices heard, we can win a raise for working families everywhere in this country.
And that starts with you:
**[Sign my petition: Tell the new Congress to debate and pass legislation that would raise the minimum wage from $7.25 an hour — a starvation wage — to a living wage of at least $15 an hour.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/minimum-wage-petition?source=em181118-full&t=3&akid=363%2E150750%2E7lMips)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/minimum-wage-petition?source=em181118-full&t=4&akid=363%2E150750%2E7lMips)
My bill has 29 co-sponsors in the Senate and more than 170 members of the House, and I suspect that number will get much higher when the new Congress is sworn in.
Add your name to theirs in support of this important legislation.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/minimum-wage-petition?source=em181118-full&t=5&akid=363%2E150750%2E7lMips)
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=363%2E150750%2E7lMips). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&akid=363%2E150750%2E7lMips).

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Onward, $26 at a time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Nearly two weeks ago, we won a historic campaign -- together. Now, Peter, we must look to the future. What you win on Election Day is the ability to fight all the battles ahead -- fights like protecting collective bargaining rights, raising the minimum wage, keeping jobs from being shipped overseas, and creating an economy that rewards work over wealth. On Election Day, the people of Ohio told me they trust I will fight like hell for them in the months and years ahead. **Peter, I'm telling you that I still need you beside me.** | | | [CHIP IN](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd7f/4462dc26/8b1f8364/201f0b25/3354443948/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTE4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181118?refcode=sbe181118_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
**Let's turn our attention to the road ahead and start rebuilding our strength.** Our average online contribution is still $26. [**I 'm personally asking, can you match that today?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd7f/4462dc26/8b1f8364/201f0b24/3354443948/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTE4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181118?refcode=sbe181118_m_other&refcode2=3268183&amount=26")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd7f/4462dc26/8b1f8364/201f0b1b/3354443948/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTE4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181118?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181118_m_5&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd7f/4462dc26/8b1f8364/201f0b1b/3354443948/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTE4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181118?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181118_m_10&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd7f/4462dc26/8b1f8364/201f0b1b/3354443948/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTE4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181118?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181118_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd7f/4462dc26/8b1f8364/201f0b25/3354443948/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTE4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181118?refcode=sbe181118_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
I fight like hell for _all Americans_ \-- regardless of their zip code, economic status, or color of their skin. And as we move to implement policies that reward those who make this country work, I need your support.
We have a lot to do, and there are more powerful opponents standing between us and the America we want to build. The kind of grassroots effort that won this election is exactly what we'll need to make real change in Washington. **With healthcare, voting rights, honoring the dignity of work, and respect for all Americans still on the line, we have to keep up that energy.**
Onward and with gratitude,
Sherrod
